# --json + daemon-side error: JSON envelope on stdout, "Error: ..." not on
# stderr. Per ASSUMPTIONS.md, --json errors must be jq-pipeable.

mockd start run_error_code=INVALID_MANIFEST run_error_message='daemon rejected manifest'
! agentctl --json run -f manifest.yaml
stdout '"ok":false'
stdout '"code":"INVALID_MANIFEST"'
stdout 'daemon rejected manifest'
! stderr 'Error: '
mockd assert-method-called RunAgent

-- manifest.yaml --
name: ok
command: ["/bin/true"]
allowed_hosts: []
allowed_paths: []
